center.name: 威廉·埃尔福德·利奇
center.summary: 威廉·埃尔福德·利奇是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括长尾鸭、Fasciated antshrike、红头黑鹂，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fasciated antshrike (Cymbilaimus lineatus) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Central America from Honduras south and in every mainland South American country except Argentina, Chile, Paraguay, and Uruguay.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scarlet-headed blackbird (Amblyramphus holosericeus) is an icterid found in the South American wetlands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: thumb|Breeding male, Norway The long-tailed duck (Clangula hyemalis) is a medium-sized sea duck that breeds in the tundra and taiga regions of the arctic and winters along the northern coastlines of the Atlantic and Pacific Oceans
